channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: El 80% de las empresas españolas perfila la IA como prioridad estratégica para este 2025
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) continúa en boga al alzarse como una de las principales prioridades de los líderes empresariales a lo largo y ancho del globo este 2025. El enfoque predominante para los próximos doce meses seguirá estando relacionado con la obtención de resultados tangibles.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 12 ways to grow as an IT leader in 2025
item.description: The technology landscape isn’t the only element evolving within the IT department, nor are rank-and-file staffers the only IT professionals expected to upskill. CIOs, too, are expanding their executive capabilities — as they should be — given the everchanging list of challenges they face.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Evolution of Project Management Offices: Redefining Success and Delivering Business Impact
item.description: Project management offices are being redefined to focus on delivering business impact, strategic alignment, higher ROI, reliability, and stakeholder confidence.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Instagram Launches Edits App Amid TikTok's U.S. Ban
item.description: Instagram launches new video creation app, Edits, amidst legal struggles faced by TikTok in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Trump says he won’t let TikTok stay dark
item.description: President-elect Trump said Sunday he will issue an executive order to postpone the ban on TikTok and give its Chinese-based company ByteDance more time to divest from the platform. "I’m asking companies not to let TikTok stay dark!" Trump wrote on Truth Social on Sunday morning.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Who could buy TikTok? Only a few parties are serious about offering
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The supremely popular TikTok could be banned on Jan. 19 under a federal law that forces the video sharing platform to divest itself from its China-based parent company, ByteDance, or shut down its U.S. operations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Apple's M4 Mac mini might be one of the best Macs ever, but it has a serious issue that needs fixing right now
item.description: The Apple Mac mini (M4) is undoubtedly one of the best mini PCs available, but recent issues with its USB-C ports have left users frustrated.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Qué deberían saber los directores de Recursos Humanos este 2025
item.description: El nuevo año trae consigo un panorama corporativo heredado cuanto menos desafiante. En este sentido, la firma de análisis e investigación Gartner ha revelado nueve predicciones sobre el lugar de trabajo que los líderes de Recursos Humanos (RR.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Fox will stream next month's Super Bowl for free on Tubi
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fox will stream the Super Bowl on Tubi for the first time, giving streamers and cord cutters a chance to watch the big game on Feb. 9 for free. Tubi was acquired by Fox Corporation in 2020. It is a free, ad-supported streaming service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Biden's big semiconductor law will ramp up US chip production -- but at a high cost, report finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A sweeping 2022 law, touted by President Joe Biden as a way to revive U.S. manufacturing of semiconductors and reduce the country’s reliance on foreign-made computer chips, will “sharply increase production’’ of semiconductors in the United States.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: These top online AI courses can help advance your career
item.description: Demand for generative AI (genAI) courses is surging, passing all other tech skills courses and spanning fields from data science to cybersecurity, project management, and marketing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intro to Ktor: The server-side stack
item.description: My previous article introduced Ktor and some of its basic features for building web applications. Now, we’ll expand the example application developed in that article by adding persistent data and HTMX, which will provide more interactive views.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Angular team unveils strategy for 2025
item.description: The 2025 strategy document for Google’s Angular web development framework calls for enhancing the developer experience with capabilities such as zoneless change detection and signal-based forms, and making developer adoption of new features easier with schematics.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg will cohost reception with Republican billionaires for Trump inauguration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is cohosting a reception with billionaire Republican donors next week for Donald Trump’s inauguration, the latest sign of the Facebook founder's embrace of the president-elect.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Court lets Tennessee porn site age verification law take effect as Texas law goes to Supreme Court
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — A panel of appeals judges has ruled that Tennessee can begin enforcing a law that requires pornographic websites to verify their visitors’ age as the First Amendment debate rises to the U.S. Supreme Court this week for oral arguments over a similar Texas law.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US TikTok users flock to Chinese app Xiaohongshu in protest with TikTok ban looming
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — As the threat of a TikTok ban looms, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ericsson unveils genAI assistant for 5G network operations
item.description: Telecommunications and networking provider Ericsson recently launched its generative AI-based virtual assistant that uses large language model (LLM) technology to read, understand, and generate new content to provide personalized answers for network operators configuring wireless 5G networks, troubl
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Next-gen Ethernet standards set to move forward in 2025
item.description: 2024 was a banner year for Ethernet, which has been a foundational element of networking for more than 50 years and is poised for more advancements as 2025 kicks off. Multiple standards and certification efforts made progress in 2024, helping networks to be more reliable and deliver more bandwidth.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Revolutionary Living Spaces: AC Future and Pininfarina Collaborate
item.description: AC Future partners with Pininfarina to create AI-enabled sustainable living solutions, pushing boundaries of conventional housing standards.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: HPE beats Dell and Supermicro in $1B AI server deal with X
item.description: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has signed a contract exceeding $1 billion to provide AI servers for X, the platform formerly known as Twitter, according to Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The cloud cost wake-up call I predicted
item.description: For years, I’ve cautioned organizations about the hidden downsides of cloud computing. Ironically, I’m “Dave the cloud guy” who warns enterprises about the cloud. The benefits of the cloud’s agility, scalability, and innovation can quickly become a financial sinkhole without proper management.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Brazil law restricts use of smartphones in elementary and high schools
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil's President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Monday signed a bill restricting the use of smartphones at school, following a global trend for such limitations. The move will impact students at elementary and high schools across the South American nation starting in February.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE and DIARLEI RODRIGUES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
